subject: Print jobs stuck; others cannot print to shared printer
description: Queue on print server shows error; restarting user's PC did not clear server-side jobs.

ts_steps.title: Open local queue
ts_steps.action: Settings → Bluetooth & devices → Printers & scanners → printer → Open queue.

ts_steps.title: Clear spool folder if stuck
ts_steps.action: Stop spooler; delete files in Windows\System32\spool\PRINTERS (elevated, policy); start spooler.

ts_steps.title: Server queue
ts_steps.action: If permitted: Print Management on server → cancel jobs → restart server spooler.

ts_steps.title: Server Event Viewer
ts_steps.action: If multiple printers fail, check server Application log.

ts_steps.title: Re-add connection
ts_steps.action: Add printer using shared queue path or IPP URL from admin.

ts_steps.title: Driver match
ts_steps.action: PCL6 vs PS universal per server team.

ts_steps.title: Remove duplicates
ts_steps.action: Delete extra queues pointing to same share.

ts_steps.title: Document error
ts_steps.action: Capture stuck job error properties for server team.

internal_information: Server-side job, driver, spooler crash. Client-only clear insufficient when server holds job.
